How are the elderly different? Include micronutrient rich foods in the diets of elderly people to enable them to be fit and active Rationale: /c247Body composition changes with advancing age, and these changes affect nutritional needs of the elderly. /c247Elderly or aged people require reduced amounts of calories, as their lean muscle mass and physical activity decrease with ageing. /c247Elderly are more prone to diseases due to lowered food intake, physical
